_comment: Baseline KPIs for Google Merchandise Store, April 2017. Source: sql/04_baseline_metrics.sql executed in bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample
currency_note: All monetary values in this file are USD - the Google Merchandise Store is a US-based account and BigQuery returns transactionRevenue in USD. Any SEK figures elsewhere in this repository are presentation-layer conversions at 10.5 SEK/USD for the Swedish-market hiring audience, not source-currency values.

TIER_1_HIGH_INTENT.business_interpretation: High purchase intent: multiple sessions, strong funnel engagement, abandoned cart signals

TIER_2_WARM.business_interpretation: Warm prospects: product browsing, light funnel engagement

TIER_3_BROWSER.business_interpretation: Light browsers: minimal funnel action, early-stage awareness

TIER_4_LOW_SIGNAL.business_interpretation: Baseline noise: bounced or single-pageview sessions

signal_scarcity_problem.keywords_at_threshold: Only top 1-2% of keywords reach signal threshold
signal_scarcity_problem.implication: 99% of keywords bid on zero-conversion data; Smart Bidding blind on mid-funnel keywords

oci_amplification.business_meaning: 6.9x more bid-training data for Smart Bidding to stabilize on mid-funnel keywords
